name: paste-safely
title: Paste Safely
description: Paste with per-app and per-website confirmation policies
author: alexi.build

commands.name: configure
commands.title: Configure
commands.description: Configure paste confirmation policies for apps and websites

commands.name: paste
commands.title: Paste
commands.description: Paste clipboard content with confirmation based on app/website policy

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublisOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
